disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive yellowing of the skin and eyes over about a week, deepening markedly today, with intense generalised itching
trigger_question_examples: When did the yellowing start and how has it changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The yellow started about a week ago and got a lot worse today. The whole of me is yellow now and the itch is unbearable — I've scratched until I've bled.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New deep, boring epigastric pain radiating straight through to the mid-back, unrelieved by change of position and worse lying flat, preventing sleep
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and does it go anywhere?
Does anything make the pain better or worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a deep boring pain in my upper tummy that shoots straight through to my back. Lying down makes it worse so I've been pacing; leaning forward helps a tiny bit. Nothing stops it and I can't sleep.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dark 'coca-cola' urine and pale, clay-coloured (acholic) stools
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in the colour of your urine or bowel motions?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — my urine has gone really dark like Coca-Cola, and my bowel motions have turned pale, almost like clay.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss of about 10 kg over two months with marked loss of appetite
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight without trying?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've dropped about 10 kilos over the last two months without trying and I've gone right off my food.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently diagnosed new-onset diabetes despite no typical risk factors
trigger_question_examples: Have you been diagnosed with any new conditions recently?
Any recent problems with blood sugar or new medicines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Funnily enough I was told a month or two ago I've developed diabetes, which surprised me — I've never had sugar trouble and I don't have the usual risks.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, shaking chills/rigors, or confusion at present
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers or shaking chills?
Are you feeling confused, drowsy or more unwell in yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever or shaking chills that I've noticed, and I'm not confused — just in agony and exhausted.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No recent paracetamol overdose and minimal alcohol use
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken a lot of paracetamol recently?
How much alcohol do you drink?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't taken any big amounts of paracetamol, and I barely drink alcohol at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Spouse present and able to assist and arrange transport; patient severely sleep-deprived and distressed and cannot lie down
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you who can help?
Are you able to get to a hospital if you need to?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My spouse is here with me and can help and drive, but I honestly can't sit still or lie down with this pain.
